Class Table

java.lang.Object
cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.game.Table
public class Table extends Object
Represents a table in a poker game. Manages the game flow, community cards, betting rounds, and determines the winner.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Table(Server parent, BlockingQueue<String> commandQueue)
    Constructs a new Table instance with reference to the parent server and command queue.

    Description
    void

    Adds players to the table.

    Appends a message to the game chat log.

    Returns the current bet threshold.
    List<ChatMessage>
    getChatMessages()
    Returns the list of chat messages exchanged during the game.

    getCommunityCards()
    Returns the deck of cards used in the game.

    Returns the index of the dealer.

    getPlayers()
    Returns the list of players currently at the table.
    int
    getPotSize()
    Returns the size of the pot.
    int
    getWaitingForIndex()
    Returns the index of the player currently waiting for their turn.
    boolean
    isGameWon()
    Checks whether the game has been won (only one player left).
    void
    startRound()
    Starts a new round of poker.

  • Constructor Details

    • Table

      public Table(Server parent, BlockingQueue<String> commandQueue)
      Constructs a new Table instance with reference to the parent server and command queue.
      Parameters:
      parent - The server managing this table.
      commandQueue - A queue containing commands sent by players.

  • Method Details

    • startRound

      public void startRound() throws InterruptedException
      Starts a new round of poker. Handles dealing cards, betting rounds, community cards, and determines the winner.
      Throws:
      InterruptedException - if interrupted while waiting for commands.

    • getPlayers

      public ArrayList<Player> getPlayers()
      Returns the list of players currently at the table.
      Returns:
      List of players.

    • getPotSize

      public int getPotSize()
      Returns the size of the pot.
      Returns:
      size of the pot.

    • getBetThreshold

      public int getBetThreshold()
      Returns the current bet threshold.
      Returns:
      current bet threshold.

    • getDealerIndex

      public int getDealerIndex()
      Returns the index of the dealer.
      Returns:
      index of the dealer.

    • getCommunityCards

      public ArrayList<Card> getCommunityCards()
      Returns the deck of cards used in the game.
      Returns:
      deck of cards.

    • getWaitingForIndex

      public int getWaitingForIndex()
      Returns the index of the player currently waiting for their turn.
      Returns:
      index of the player waiting for their turn.

    • addPlayers

      public void addPlayers(List<ServerEndpoint> serverEndpoints)
      Adds players to the table.
      Parameters:
      serverEndpoints - List of server endpoints representing players.

    • isGameWon

      public boolean isGameWon()
      Checks whether the game has been won (only one player left).
      Returns:
      true if only one player remains, false otherwise.

    • appendMessageToChat

      public void appendMessageToChat(String message, boolean isSystemMessage)
      Appends a message to the game chat log.
      Parameters:
      message - The message to add.
      isSystemMessage - Whether the message is from the system or a player.

    • getChatMessages

      public List<ChatMessage> getChatMessages()
      Returns the list of chat messages exchanged during the game.
      Returns:
      List of chat messages.
